gold_standard.name: Gold Standard
gold_standard.description: Premium registry with strong co-benefit verification (SDGs). Recognized by ICAO CORSIA.

verra_vcs.name: Verra (VCS)
verra_vcs.description: Largest voluntary carbon market registry. Verified Carbon Standard (VCS) is the most widely used.

cdm.name: Clean Development Mechanism (CDM)
cdm.description: UN-backed compliance mechanism under Kyoto Protocol. CERs recognized in many national systems.

acr.name: American Carbon Registry (ACR)
acr.description: US-focused registry, first private voluntary GHG registry. Used in California compliance.

car.name: Climate Action Reserve (CAR)
car.description: North American focus. Offset credits (CRTs) recognized by California Cap-and-Trade.

puro_earth.name: Puro.earth
puro_earth.description: Carbon removal-focused registry. Biochar, BECCS, enhanced weathering, direct air capture.

plan_vivo.name: Plan Vivo
plan_vivo.description: Community-focused land use and forestry projects. Strong social co-benefits.

renewable_energy.label: Renewable Energy
renewable_energy.description: Wind, solar, hydro, and geothermal power generation displacing fossil fuels

forestry_afforestation.label: Afforestation / Reforestation
forestry_afforestation.description: Planting trees on degraded or non-forested land to sequester carbon

redd_plus.label: REDD+ (Avoided Deforestation)
redd_plus.description: Protecting existing forests from deforestation and degradation

cookstove.label: Clean Cookstoves
cookstove.description: Distributing efficient cookstoves to reduce biomass burning in developing regions

methane_capture.label: Methane Capture
methane_capture.description: Capturing methane from landfills, mines, or agriculture and destroying or using it

blue_carbon.label: Blue Carbon (Mangroves/Seagrass)
blue_carbon.description: Restoring and protecting coastal ecosystems that sequester carbon in sediments

direct_air_capture.label: Direct Air Capture (DAC)
direct_air_capture.description: Machines that extract CO2 directly from ambient air and store it permanently

biochar.label: Biochar
biochar.description: Converting biomass waste into stable carbon and applying it to soil

enhanced_weathering.label: Enhanced Rock Weathering
enhanced_weathering.description: Spreading crushed silicate rocks on farmland to accelerate natural CO2 absorption

community_energy.label: Community-Based Energy Access
community_energy.description: Solar microgrids and clean energy for off-grid communities

quality_criteria.additionality: Would this emission reduction have happened without carbon finance? The project must demonstrate that it would not be viable without credit revenue.
quality_criteria.permanence: How long will the carbon stay out of the atmosphere? Geological storage (DAC, enhanced weathering) > biochar > forests > avoided emissions.
quality_criteria.leakage: Does the project cause emissions elsewhere? E.g., protecting one forest may shift logging pressure to another.
quality_criteria.measurability: Can the emission reductions be accurately measured, reported, and verified (MRV)?
quality_criteria.co_benefits: Does the project deliver additional social, environmental, or economic benefits beyond carbon?

market_data.price_trend: Voluntary prices recovering from 2023 dip. Removal credits (DAC, biochar) trending significantly higher than avoidance credits.
market_data.icvcm_core_carbon_principles: The Integrity Council for the Voluntary Carbon Market (ICVCM) Core Carbon Principles (CCPs) set the bar for high-quality credits. Look for CCP-labelled credits from 2025.
market_data.article6_status: Paris Agreement Article 6 rules finalized at COP28. Corresponding adjustments now required for cross-border credit transfers.

claim_types.carbon_neutral: Offset 100% of measured emissions. Must follow PAS 2060 or equivalent.
claim_types.climate_positive: Offset more than 100% of measured emissions (net negative).
claim_types.contribution_claim: Fund climate action without claiming neutrality. Increasingly preferred by SBTi.
claim_types.insetting: Reduce emissions within your own value chain rather than buying external offsets.

best_practices: Measure and reduce first, offset residual emissions only
Diversify across project types and geographies
Prioritize removal credits over avoidance for SBTi alignment
Use CCP-labelled or Gold Standard certified credits
Retire credits in a public registry (not just purchased)
Disclose your offset portfolio and methodology transparently
